title: Hollywood Party
director: Richard Boleslawski, Allan Dwan, Edmund Goulding
writer: Howard Dietz, Arthur Kober, Richy Craig Jr.
actors: Stan Laurel, Oliver Hardy, Jimmy Durante
plot: Jimmy Durante is jungle star Schnarzan the Conqueror, but the public is tiring of his fake lions. So when Baron Munchausen comes to town with real man-eating lions, Durante throws a big party for him so that he might use the lions...
